title: dicliptera glabra
intro: Dicliptera glabra, also known as Smooth False Dragonhead, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dicliptera glabra include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and providing relief from various allergies. The herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
